keywords.job: Look at my blackened beard? I'm the steamship captain!
keywords.work: Look at my blackened beard? I'm the steamship captain!
keywords.name: I am Brodrosch Steamtrousers, son of the machine, of the Molten Rock.
keywords.ship: This is a great ship. Ha! It works without wind but with fire, and it travels not on the ocean but beneath the earth!
keywords.steamship: This is a great ship. Ha! It works without wind but with fire, and it travels not on the ocean but beneath the earth!
keywords.captain: Of course, I am the captain. But I am also a technomancer.
keywords.technomancer: Being a technomancer is a privilege few dwarfs have. We form earth and fire through powerful technology into tools. Also, we are great inventors.
keywords.inventors: Yes. There could have been thousands of our inventions, if they wouldn't explode all the time...
keywords.inventions: Yes. There could have been thousands of our inventions, if they wouldn't explode all the time...
keywords.sell: This is not a shop, damn it!
keywords.buy: This is not a shop, damn it!
keywords.thais: This is a steamship that travels only subterreneanly. No way to get on that risky ocean. Kazordoon - Cormaya only.

keywords.kazordoon: Hey, we ARE at Kazordoon! Must be the cavemadness...
keywords.beer: Sometimes being drunk means seeing two rivers. I survive by steering right between them.
keywords.gurbasch: Ah, my brother in Cormaya. He can take you back.
keywords.cormaya: So you want to go to Cormaya? 150 gold?

texts: Welcome, ! May Earth protect you, even whilst sailing!
Look at my blackened beard? I'm the steamship captain!
